# ASImportableItem

**Structure**

An item for use in import and export.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ASImportableItem
```

## Overview

An item represents an account for a service stored by the password manager. One item can store multiple credentials. For example, to represent an account with a password and a passkey, use an item with two credentials: a [doc://com.apple.authenticationservices/documentation/AuthenticationServices/ASImportableCredential/BasicAuthentication] password and a [doc://com.apple.authenticationservices/documentation/AuthenticationServices/ASImportableCredential/Passkey].

This type is a representation of `Item` as defined in the Credential Exchange Format (CXF) specification. You can supply a JSON representation of a CXF `Item` to initialize an instance of this struct by using a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder] and calling [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder/decode(_:from:)].

## Accessing item properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the item.
- **created**: The item’s creation date and time.
- **lastModified**: The item’s last modified date and time.
- **subtitle**: A subtitle or description of this item, if any.
- **credentials**: The credentials associated with this item.
- **ASImportableCredential**: A credential for use in import and export.
- **tags**: The user-defined tags associated with this item, if any.

## Initializers

- **init(id:created:lastModified:title:subtitle:favorite:scope:credentials:tags:)**
- **init(id:title:subtitle:favorite:scope:credentials:tags:)**

## Instance Properties

- **favorite**: Indicate whether this is a “favorite” item.
- **scope**: The scope for where the credential can be used.
- **title**: The user-defined name or title of this item.

## Accessing account properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the account.
- **userName**: The username associated with the account.
- **email**: The email address associated with this account.
- **fullName**: The full name of the account owner, if provided.
- **collections**: The collections stored in this account.
- **ASImportableCollection**: A collection of items and subcollections for use in import and export.
- **items**: All items stored in the account.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
